full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Finding a suitable methodological paper within exam constraints
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Suggest a safe and easy ICML paper based on SVM that is reproducible and not deep learning.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped shortlist classical SVM-based papers from ICML.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I verified the venue, year, and paper type from ICML proceedings.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Is The Constrained Weight Space SVM: Learning with Ranked Features a good choice?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that the paper is methodological and SVM-based.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I read the abstract and optimization formulation to confirm it modifies standard SVM.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Explain constrained weight space SVM in simple terms.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped me understand how weight constraints are added to the SVM optimization.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I cross-checked with Section 3 of the paper where constraints are defined.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Can this paper be implemented on a CPU with small datasets?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that it uses linear SVM and quadratic programming only.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I checked that experiments were on text datasets and linear models.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Make my paper selection justification sound human for a 3rd year BTech student.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Improved clarity and natural tone of my explanation.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I reviewed and edited the paragraph before finalizing.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Is The Constrained Weight Space SVM: Learning with Ranked Features a good choice?
top_5_prompts.why_important: Helped confirm suitability under exam constraints.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Explain constrained weight space SVM in simple terms.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Helped me understand the algorithm before committing.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Can this paper be implemented on a CPU with small datasets?

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Part A.
